title: Official Information Act 1982 — New Zealand
description: New Zealand legislation establishing the right to access official information held by public agencies, setting procedures for requests, defining reasons for withholding information, and establishing oversight mechanisms through the Ombudsmen. Foundational for public sector information governance and transparency requirements.
